title: MoreFun
description:
This is a packet with a number of new recipes
这是一个数据包，新增了许多配方
body:
# EN
This is a packet with a number of new recipes

You can use more recipes to craft more things!

### Introduction
The packets used by the HCN server are written by the Hong_SZ

### Environment
Minecraft 1.17 and above

### Installation tutorial
- Put in datapacks
- Enter /reload
- Start playing

You can find it in the [link](https://gitee.com/hong-sz/datapacket)查看
[https://gitee.com/hong-sz/datapacket](https://gitee.com/hong-sz/datapacket)

# CN

这是一个数据包，新增了许多配方

你可以用更多的配方，去合成更多的东西！

### 介绍
HCN服务器所使用的数据包 由Hong_SZ所编写

### 环境
Minecraft 1.17及以上

### 安装教程
- 放入datapacks
- 输入/reload
- 开始游玩

具体配方可在[Gitee](https://gitee.com/hong-sz/datapacket)查看
[https://gitee.com/hong-sz/datapacket](https://gitee.com/hong-sz/datapacket)
